summary: Options Menu | Navigating to Broadcast Options tab
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Options Menu
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the "Broadcast Options" tab
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Broadcast Options, <x> of <y> Options, press down to navigate Broadcast Options, Press up for player controls, Press <appropriate_directions> for more options, Press back to dismiss controls.”
